overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character with a large backpack traversing a snowy mountain environment. The character walks through a shallow river with a cascading waterfall before ascending onto snow-covered terrain and entering an open alpine valley.

scene_state.functional_zone: shallow mountain river with cascading waterfall

events.description: character climbs up the small waterfall and rapids in the river

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow river water toward a cascading waterfall, navigating around submerged rocks

entered.detail: multi-tiered cascading waterfall with white water flowing over rocks
steep rock walls with patches of snow flanking the river canyon
large rock partially submerged in the river current
snow-covered mountain peaks visible in the background

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a shallow mountain river surrounded by steep canyon walls, approaching and climbing a small cascading waterfall. The water flows rapidly around submerged boulders as snow-covered peaks loom in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-covered rocky shoreline at river's edge

events.description: character exits the river onto snow-covered rocks and leaves the water behind

agents.ego_description: climbing out of the river onto snow-covered rocky terrain and ascending the shoreline

entered.detail: rocks covered in fresh snow at the river's edge
large rock formation jutting from the snow

segments.scene_description: Exiting the river, the character ascends onto snow-covered rocks at the water's edge. The waterfall and river boulders fall behind as the character moves away from the canyon walls toward higher ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open alpine snow valley between mountain peaks

events.description: environment opens into a wide snow-covered mountain valley with panoramic views

agents.ego_description: trekking uphill through deep snow toward a distant mountain pass

entered.detail: expansive field of deep snow stretching toward the horizon
distant saddle point between snow-covered peaks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast snow-covered alpine valley surrounded by mountain peaks on all sides. The character treks through deep snow, leaving the rocky canyon behind, heading toward a distant mountain pass under an overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rugged river canyon that culminates in an ascent up a cascading waterfall. It begins with the character wading through a shallow mountain river, where water flows rapidly around submerged boulders. As the camera tracks forward, the perspective is framed by steep canyon walls that lead toward a small waterfall. The scene then shifts upward as the character climbs the falling water, finally revealing a broader view of snow-covered peaks looming in the distant background.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character leaves a narrow river canyon to enter a vast, open alpine valley. It begins with the character ascending from the water onto snow-covered rocks, leaving the cascading waterfall and river boulders behind. As the character moves away from the confining canyon walls toward higher ground, the terrain gradually opens up into a wide, snow-blanketed expanse. The scene then expands to reveal a massive valley surrounded by towering mountain peaks under an overcast sky. Finally, the camera follows the character as they trek through deep snow, heading away from the rocky cliffs toward a distant mountain pass.
